# Navigating Transactional Turbulence, by Patti Smith

> A real estate field guide by Patti Smith, an El Dorado County REALTOR, mapping the 116 kinds of
> transactional turbulence that can disrupt a home purchase or sale, and how a trusted consultant
> guides buyers and sellers safely through each one.

## About
- Author: Patti Smith, Real Estate Consultant (Patti Smith Real Estate, Independent)
- License: CA DRE #01110483
- Office: 6180 State Highway 193, Georgetown, CA 95634
- Phone: (530) 368-0852
- Serving El Dorado County and the Sierra foothills since 1992
- Buy the book: https://a.co/d/0cUtRfJM

## The book
- Premise: every real estate transaction can hit unexpected turbulence; the book identifies 116 distinct kinds and explains each from both the borrower's and seller's perspective, with the lesson and a guiding principle.
- Coverage spans loan and income issues, credit and debt, buyer and seller motivation, appraisal and inspection problems, title and closing complications, wire fraud, and more.
- Audience: buyers and sellers who want to understand what can go wrong in a transaction and how to avoid it.
